creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
x11-fonts/nucleus build is broken on bento, since the port does not
support XFree 4.0. The attached patch should fix the problem, but I don't
have a box with XFree 4.0 to test the build. Could anybody please take
a look at this patch and check that it builds on XFree 4.0?

Fix: Apply this:
How-To-Repeat: See http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/5-latest/nucleus-0.77.log.
